title: DPI-C structures seem to come out backwards!

features.name: dpi-c struct inout parameter import
features.description: Code should include an import "DPI-C" function declaration with a struct type inout parameter
features.snippet: import "DPI-C" function integer c_func(inout iostruct ios);

features.name: sv struct definition with multiple integer fields
features.description: Code should include a struct definition with multiple integer fields used in DPI-C interop
features.snippet: typedef struct { int field_a; int field_b; int field_c; } iostruct;

features.name: struct member assignment and dpi-c function call
features.description: Code should include struct member assignments followed by passing the struct to a DPI-C function call
